description: Average characters per word over alphabetic tokens.
Length-stable lexical richness; repetition raises K.
formula: 10^4 * (S2 - N) / N^2 (S2=sum of squared type freqs, N=tokens)

description: Share of words matching a curated archaic/rare-word list.
Hapax-based lexical richness; more once-only words raise R.

higher_means: more frequent use of the function word
description: Per-word rate of each common function word (the, of, and); a hard-to-fake fingerprint.
Average alphabetic words per sentence; a pacing proxy.
Population standard deviation of sentence length in words.
Mean over sentences of the deepest token's distance to the dependency ROOT.

higher_means: larger share of that sentence type
description: Shares of simple, compound, and complex sentences (sum to 1).
Per-word rate of each punctuation group (commas, semicolons, dashes).
Contractions per word; excludes the possessive 's.
Fraction of words inside double quotes. Higher means more dialogue.
ADJ-tagged tokens as a fraction of all words.
ADV-tagged tokens as a fraction of all words.
Shared-vocabulary fraction between an author and you, over content-word lemmas.
